name: @artale/pi-leads
description: Terminal CRM and outreach pipeline. Track prospects, manage follow-ups, draft messages.
readme:
# @artale/pi-leads

Terminal CRM and outreach pipeline. Track prospects, manage follow-ups.

## Install
```bash
npm install -g @artale/pi-leads
```

## Tools
- **leads_add** — Add a lead
- **leads_search** — Search by name, company, stage
- **leads_followup** — Get leads needing follow-up (3+ days idle)
- **leads_pipeline** — Pipeline summary by stage

## Commands
- `/leads` — CRM dashboard
